hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && FILES=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR HEAD | grep -E '\.py$'); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "$FILES" | xargs ruff check --fix 2>/dev/null; echo "$FILES" | xargs ruff format 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE_PATH=$(python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))") && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '\.env|secrets|\.toml$' && echo 'BLOCK: 민감 파일 수정 차단됨' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
